item.title: Grass ain't so greener on the other side
item.description: It's all corporate and AI slop these days wherever you go and if you manage to find a place that isn't, it rapidly turns into that. Protesting has been fun and all but I have my doubts about a new home.

item.title: His roommate was devastated after he lost his childhood cat, so he surprised him with a little present
item.dc:creator: HichooArchi

item.title: Yeeaaah... I ain't going nowhere.
item.description: Bunch of you have asked if I'm gonna blow up my account posting horse smut, or just abandon Imgur altogether. The answer is a big, fat nope to both. I get why some folks are fed up, but leaving or staying is a personal decision and I'm choosing to ride this ship straight into the seabed. I'll still play around on other platforms like Bluesky, where I post spicier horses among other things, and Discord of course. I'm excited to see the shiny new alt platforms take shape, but they're not quite there yet. So yeah... you're kind of stuck with me. ;)
item.dc:creator: ElbowDeepInAHorse

item.title: Car company claiming the self driving collision recording was missing, perhaps to avoid culpability
item.dc:creator: Grogu007

item.description: NASA has released the most detailed image of the Sun ever captured, created using data from the Parker Solar Probe! This remarkable image is a composite of 200 individual shots, stitched together to reveal the Sun in unprecedented detail. The photograph showcases intricate patterns on the solar surface, including swirling plasma, sunspots, and magnetic field lines, offering scientists a clearer view of the star’s dynamic activity. This breakthrough not only highlights the capabilities of the Solar Probe but also brings us one step closer to understanding the complex forces driving solar weather and its impact on Earth. https://mymodernmet.com/parker-solar-probe-closest-ever-images-of-the-sun-nasa/
item.dc:creator: TheRainbowegoSweet007

item.title: Revenge Never Tasted So Sweet
item.description: On October 1977, Anita Bryant, a singer and prominent anti-gay rights activist, was hit in the face with a pie during a press conference in Des Moines, Iowa. The incident occurred amid her highly publicized campaign against a Dade County, Florida, ordinance that protected gay people from discrimination. Bryant, a devout Christian and former Miss Oklahoma, led the "Save Our Children" campaign, arguing that homosexuality was sinful and that gay rights threatened family values. Her efforts successfully repealed the ordinance, making her a polarizing figure. During the press conference, a gay rights activist named Thom Higgins threw a pie in her face as a protest against her anti-gay stance. The moment was captured on camera and widely publicized, becoming a symbolic act of resistance against her campaign. Bryant, visibly shaken, wiped the pie off her face and prayed with her husband, saying, "Father, we forgive him." The incident fueled further debate, with some viewing it as a justified act of defiance and others as an attack on free speech. The pie-throwing became an iconic moment in the gay rights movement, highlighting the intense cultural and political divide over LGBTQ+ rights in the 1970s. It also marked a turning point, as Bryant's public image suffered; her career as a singer and spokesperson for brands like Florida Citrus Commission declined sharply afterward due to boycotts and backlash. The event remains a notable example of political protest through public humiliation. Video source: https://youtu.be/5tHGmSh7f-0?feature=shared #lgbtq #gayhistory
item.dc:creator: TheTaoofRob

item.title: A way to find keys in a muddy puddle.
item.dc:creator: LinaTitli

item.title: GovBrief Today - #213
item.description: This is what America looks like when the guardrails start disappearing. ? Today, the White House considered a plan to displace two million Gazans, escalated a visa ban to block UN invitees, and threatened to send troops into Chicago, just as they have in D.C. and L.A. The people around him aren't stopping this raw, personal power because their own power depends on his. We have to decide if we're a nation of laws or the subjects of one man. There are “Workers over Billionaires” protests everywhere today. Find one. Don’t leave truth to the algorithm. Our free and private nightly email arms you with images, data, and quotes so you can see it all for yourself. Add your email at govbrief dot today or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com [1] https://go.govbrief.today/legal-status-firefighter-detained [2] https://go.govbrief.today/us-gaza-displacement-control [3] https://go.govbrief.today/us-palestinian-visas-refused [4] https://go.govbrief.today/fda-official-video-dispute [5] https://go.govbrief.today/us-market-valuation-high [6] https://go.govbrief.today/million-immigrant-workers-gone [7] https://go.govbrief.today/guatemalan-children-protected-deportation [8] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-blocks-rep-randall [9] https://go.govbrief.today/noem-warns-chicago-surge [10] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-riot-compensation-meeting [11] https://go.govbrief.today/mueller-parkinsons-testimony [12] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-fed-raise-1percent [13] https://go.govbrief.today/noem-la-burned-down [14] https://go.govbrief.today/dod-microsoft-warning-china [15] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-clemens-mlb-lawsuit [16] https://go.govbrief.today/protest-safely Hey there, Imgur. Reminder that I can read private chat messages, but have lost my ability to send them for unspecified nasty warning messages that I have somehow transgressed. Holiday weekend revisions to this continue. Might even be more in the pipe. Be safe today if you're protesting. Link 16 is one of the most popular resources I've ever posted. The front matter is especially helpful to re-read before headed out and there are good links from orgs like the ACLU within the doc. P.S. I know several of you have posted about your willingness to help with coding and dev stuff. I'm pretty good at swiping code from elsewhere, even Copilot, but you may be certain that I've recorded any contact info you've sent!
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: A photo of my dog Panko every day
item.dc:creator: PankoBoy

item.title: I finally found myself in People Magazine! Weeee!
item.description: This video was all a giant excuse to reenact my pose from the magazine lol Fun fact! A little girl in the checkout aisle was watching me film and snuck a copy of the magazine off the rack to find my page. I was too awkward to explain what I was doing though and pretended I didn't notice! Yay!
item.dc:creator: pikajane

item.title: Litterbox Meme Monday RETURNS! [OC]
item.description:
This one seemed ripe for a mom version! BLANK at the end so you can make your own
By YouCanCallMeKnuckles on Litterbox Discord
By AngelWingsYT on Litterbox Discord
By Prim on Litterbox Discord
BLANK! Have fun! Join us on the Litterbox Discord to get the memes early, see whats happening with the animated pilot and chat with me! https://litterbox.gg/
item.dc:creator: LitterboxComics
